sentences.target: Je cherche ma chaussure sous le canapé.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma ʃo.syʁ su lə kanape/

translations.fr: Je cherche ma chaussure sous le canapé.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma ʃo.syʁ su lə kanape/
translations.en: I'm looking for my shoe under the couch.
translations.es: Estoy buscando mi zapato debajo del sofá.
translations.de: Ich suche meinen Schuh unter dem Sofa.
translations.it: Sto cercando la mia scarpa sotto il divano.
translations.ko: 소파 아래에서 내 신발을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在沙发底下找我的鞋。
translations.ru: Я ищу свой ботинок под диваном.
translations.pt: Estou procurando meu sapato embaixo do sofá.
translations.he: אני מחפש את הנעל שלי מתחת לספה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm chiếc giày của tôi dưới gầm ghế sofa.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن حذائي تحت الأريكة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn schoen onder de bank.
translations.uk: Я шукаю свій черевик під диваном.
translations.hu: A kanapé alatt keresem a cipőmet.
translations.hi: मैं सोफ़े के नीचे अपना जूता ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το παπούτσι μου κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter skoen min under sofaen.
translations.id: Saya mencari sepatu saya di bawah sofa.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter min sko under soffan.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min sko under sofaen.
translations.ja: ソファの下で自分の靴を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject personal pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular, agrees with ‘chaussure’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘cherche’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, with ‘canapé’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sous’.

sentences.target: Ma chaussure est coincée dans la porte.
sentences.reading: /ma ʃo.syʁ ɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Ma chaussure est coincée dans la porte.
translations.ipa: /ma ʃo.syʁ ɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: My shoe is stuck in the door.
translations.es: Mi zapato está atascado en la puerta.
translations.de: Mein Schuh steckt in der Tür fest.
translations.it: La mia scarpa è incastrata nella porta.
translations.pt: Meu sapato ficou preso na porta.
translations.vi: Chiếc giày của tôi bị kẹt ở cửa.
translations.nl: Mijn schoen zit vast in de deur.
translations.hi: मेरा जूता दरवाज़े में फँस गया है.
translations.el: Το παπούτσι μου έχει κολλήσει στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Skoen min har satt seg fast i døren.
translations.sv: Min sko har fastnat i dörren.
translations.ro: Pantoful meu s-a blocat în ușă.
translations.da: Min sko sidder fast i døren.
translations.ja: 靴がドアに挟まっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular, modifies ‘chaussure’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary used as copula linking the subject to the predicate.
Past participle used adjectivally; feminine singular agreeing with ‘chaussure’, as predicate complement of ‘est’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, with ‘porte’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

translations.it: Le tue scarpe sono tutte bagnate.
translations.vi: Giày của bạn ướt hết rồi.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे जूते पूरी तरह भीग गए हैं.
translations.el: Τα παπούτσια σου είναι όλα βρεγμένα.
translations.ja: あなたの靴はびしょ濡れです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), plural form, modifies ‘chaussures’.
Common noun, feminine plural; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary used as copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of totality/intensity; variably agrees (feminine plural here) with the following adjective; modifies ‘mouillées’.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine plural; predicate complement of ‘sont’.

sentences.target: On enlève nos chaussures avant d’entrer.

translations.fr: On enlève nos chaussures avant d’entrer.
translations.en: We take off our shoes before entering.
translations.es: Nos quitamos los zapatos antes de entrar.
translations.de: Wir ziehen unsere Schuhe aus, bevor wir reingehen.
translations.it: Ci togliamo le scarpe prima di entrare.
translations.pt: Tiramos os sapatos antes de entrar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cởi giày trước khi vào nhà.
translations.nl: We doen onze schoenen uit voordat we naar binnen gaan.
translations.hi: अंदर जाने से पहले हम अपने जूते उतारते हैं.
translations.el: Βγάζουμε τα παπούτσια μας πριν μπούμε.
translations.nb: Vi tar av oss skoene før vi går inn.
translations.sv: Vi tar av oss skorna innan vi går in.
translations.ro: Ne descălțăm înainte de a intra.
translations.da: Vi tager skoene af, før vi går ind.
translations.fi: Riisumme kengät ennen kuin menemme sisään.
translations.ja: 入る前に靴を脱ぎます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, commonly used for ‘we’ in colloquial French.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular with ‘on’).
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), plural form, modifies ‘chaussures’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘enlève’.
Preposition ‘before’, taking ‘de’ + infinitive as its complement here.
Elided preposition ‘de’ before a vowel-initial verb; introduces the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘de’ headed by the preposition ‘avant’.
